name: Ironspool Ward District
district_identity: Rougher working ward of Shelkopolis where repair work, second-hand trade, practical tavern custom, and fear-tempered piety are more visible than noble finish.

arrival.detail: Noise, patched fabric, forge sparks, cheap drink, and low-end bargaining replace upper-district polish.

inside.detail: Workers, scavengers, low-ranking sellswords, and Roadwarden repair culture keep the ward in constant practical motion.

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually those shaped by the locality’s ordinary work, and public conduct is read through expectations such as doing what the place requires without visible disruption.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by local authority, custom, and whoever can actually enforce them.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as resource strain, status conflict, or outside disruption begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Ironspool Ward District stands apart through the particular combination of duty, pressure, and public expectation carried there.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Ironspool Ward District begin through local rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
